creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Philip Paeps from comment #1)

Thank you :-)

Initially, this one surprised me: 

<https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-fs/2022-September/001322.html>

> 266236_–_ZFS_NFS_:_.zfs/snapshot_:_Stale_fi le_handle

I guess, the trigger was the em dash: 

> 266236 – ZFS NFS : .zfs/snapshot : Stale file handle

----

Again, there's an additional white space. 

Nothing unusual about the word 'file' in the original, which was copied from the title of <https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=266236>. 

I wondered whether the space falls at the same point in the line, it does not. A comparison: 

> FreeBSD_comme_système_d’exploitation_hô te;_et_Microsoft_Virtual_PC
> 266236_–_ZFS_NFS_:_.zfs/snapshot_:_Stale_fi le_handle
